article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.4. GA-Application to UBCM LGDAP 2026 Grant Funding 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider Applying for Up to $200,000 in Provincial Housing Approvals Grant
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on authorizing staff to apply for up to $200,000 in provincial grant funding to speed up Burnaby's development approvals process, including faster permits for small housing projects and modular construction.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — faster permitting could affect your development or construction timelines.
